name: io.github.codespar/mcp-safrapay
description: MCP server for Safrapay — Banco Safra's acquirer (B2B-banking crossover, mid-to-large BR merchants). Credit, Pix, boleto + split, statement, tokenization, recurrence, 3DS, chargebacks, settlement, payment links.

environmentVariables.name: SAFRAPAY_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Safrapay merchant CNPJ (sent as merchantCredential header on auth)

environmentVariables.name: SAFRAPAY_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Safrapay MerchantToken used to compute the BCRYPT Authorization header on auth

environmentVariables.name: SAFRAPAY_MERCHANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Safrapay merchant id (used in request bodies where applicable)
